name: herdr-agent-org-claude
description: Skylence agent-org on the Herdr substrate, for Claude Code. Six role skills (orchestrator, planner, herdr-worker, replacer, org-audit, herdr control surface) + a filesystem board CLI, so no Solo MCP is needed: workers are real Herdr panes started with `herdr agent start`, steered with `herdr agent prompt`, and followed up with one-shot `herdr agent wait`. Four session-discipline hooks (org-lane-mark, org-stop-gate anti-idle with evidence-based premise and sweep settling, org-conduct-refresh post-compaction, planner-singleton-gate across Herdr sessions) use ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}. Ships build-slot (machine-wide compile serializer) and ghost-probe (no-fusion input-line classifier). Requires herdr >= 0.7 and HERDR_ENV=1.
